query:
SELECT triggerKey, toEmail, subject, status, sentAt FROM agent_emails WHERE triggerKey = 'gc_receipt' ORDER BY sentAt DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT triggerKey, COUNT(*) as count FROM agent_emails GROUP BY triggerKey ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
